tree.setup: The elevator in your apartment building is broken. You meet your neighbor on the stairs, both of you climbing with groceries.
tree.setup_zh: 你住的楼的电梯坏了。你在楼梯上遇到邻居，你们都提着菜。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 电梯又坏了！我住十二楼，每次都累死了。你住几楼？
turns.text_pinyin: Diàntī yòu huài le! Wǒ zhù shí'èr lóu, měi cì dōu lèi sǐ le. Nǐ zhù jǐ lóu?
turns.text_en: The elevator's broken again! I live on the twelfth floor — I'm exhausted every time. What floor do you live on?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her your floor and commiserate.

options.text_zh: 我住八楼。也够累的了。你提的东西好多。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zhù bā lóu. Yě gòu lèi de le. Nǐ tí de dōngxi hǎo duō.
options.text_en: I'm on the eighth floor. That's tiring enough. You've got a lot of stuff.

options.feedback: Dismisses her complaint in an annoying way.
She's talking about the broken elevator problem.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 没办法，只能慢慢爬。你要不要我帮你拿一个袋子？
turns.text_pinyin: Méi bànfǎ, zhǐ néng mànmàn pá. Nǐ yào bú yào wǒ bāng nǐ ná yī ge dàizi?
turns.text_en: Nothing we can do — just climb slowly. Want me to carry one of your bags?

options.text_zh: 不用不用，我还好。我们一起慢慢走吧。
options.text_pinyin: Bú yòng bú yòng, wǒ hái hǎo. Wǒmen yīqǐ mànmàn zǒu ba.
options.text_en: No no, I'm fine. Let's walk up slowly together.

options.text_pinyin: Nǐ yīnggāi bān dào dī lóucéng.
options.text_en: You should move to a lower floor.
options.feedback: Unhelpful advice when she just offered to help you.

options.text_en: When will the elevator be fixed?
options.feedback: She can't answer that, and she just offered to help you.

tree.cultural_note: Broken elevators in Chinese apartment buildings create unexpected neighborly moments. The shared inconvenience bonds people — carrying groceries up many flights together turns strangers into friends. 没办法 (nothing we can do) is a resigned but warm acceptance.
